title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AWS Cloud Architecture & Services
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AWS Cloud Architecture & Services' has been completed with a total of 12 trainees. The overall attendance rate is high at 93.3%, and the completion rate is perfect at 100%. However, the pass rate of 83.3% indicates that a portion of trainees did not meet the expected performance standards, which is a concern given the overall effectiveness classification of Risk.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
The average score of 7.32 out of 10 reflects a solid understanding of the course material among most trainees, yet it falls short of indicating full mastery.
The feedback rating of 4.71 out of 5 suggests that trainees found the course valuable, but the effectiveness score of 85.76 indicates room for improvement.
Additionally, two trainees require 1:1 support due to their performance being below the pass threshold, which highlights a need for targeted intervention.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, a review of the course content may be beneficial to address any gaps that could be contributing to the lower pass rate.
Continuous monitoring of trainee performance and feedback should be conducted to ensure that the training meets the desired outcomes.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
